text: **Anna:** Hello!
**Anna:** DC is a {city|都市/街|/ˈsɪti/|New York is a big city.} for {walking|歩くこと|/ˈwɔːkɪŋ/|Walking is good exercise.}
**Anna:** In our {neighborhood|近所/地域|/ˈneɪbərˌhʊd/|Our neighborhood is very friendly.}, I can do all my {errands|用事/買い物|/ˈerəndz/|I do my errands on Saturday.}

**Anna:** Marcia, before we get {ice cream|アイスクリーム|/ˈaɪs kriːm/|I love chocolate ice cream.}, I need to return three {books|本|/bʊks/|I read many books.} to the {library|図書館|/ˈlaɪbreri/|The library is quiet.}
**Anna:** Where is the library?
**Marsha:** It is on this street.
**Marsha:** On the corner!
**Anna:** Awesome!
**Marsha:** Let's go!
**Anna:** Marsha, I can return the books here
**Marsha:** Anna, what are those in the book?
**Anna:** Marsha, these are {letters|手紙/文字|/ˈletərz/|I write letters to my friends.}
**Anna:** to my family and friends back home.
**Anna:** Four letters.
**Anna:** Is there a {post office|郵便局|/poʊst ˈɔfɪs/|I go to the post office often.} near here?
**Marsha:** Um no.
**Marsha:** The post office is far from here.
**Marsha:** But there is a {mailbox|郵便ポスト|/ˈmeɪlbɑːks/|I put letters in the mailbox.} across from the store.
**Marsha:** Awesome, let's go.
**Anna:** Marsha, now I need to buy {stamps|切手|/stæmps/|I buy stamps at the post office.}
**Marsha:** Do you have {cash|現金|/kæʃ/|I pay with cash.}?
**Marsha:** No
**Anna:** Is there a {bank|銀行|/bæŋk/|The bank is closed now.} near here?
**Marsha:** There is a bank behind you.
**Anna:** Thanks, Marsha.
**Anna:** You know our neighborhood so well.
**Anna:** Now I have cash.
**Anna:** I can buy stamps.
**Marsha:** That store sells stamps.
**Anna:** Wait here.
**Anna:** I have {stamps|切手|/stæmps/|I collect stamps from different countries.}
**Anna:** Wow, you're {fast|速い/素早い|/fæst/|He is a fast runner.}
**Anna:** Thank you.
**Anna:** Thank you, {letters|手紙|/ˈletərz/|I write letters to my friends.}, for sending my words, my love, to my family and friends.
**Marsha:** Do you have more {cash|現金|/kæʃ/|I need cash to buy groceries.}?
**Anna:** I do.
**Anna:** {Ice cream|アイスクリーム|/ˈaɪs kriːm/|I love chocolate ice cream.}!
**Anna:** I love my new {neighborhood|近所/地域|/ˈneɪbərhʊd/|My neighborhood is very friendly.}
**Anna:** Everything is near our {apartment|アパート|/əˈpɑːrtmənt/|We live in a small apartment.}
**Anna:** Even {hair salons|美容院|/hɛr ˈsæləns/|Hair salons are busy on weekends.} and ice cream.
**Anna:** Until next time.
